author: florianwoelki
description: Add anki-like spaced repetition and recall to your vault.

manifest.author: Florian Woelki
manifest.description: Add anki-like spaced repetition and recall to your vault.
manifest.name: Better Recall

name: Better Recall

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed for Users
* fix: issue with past scheduled card by @FlorianWoelki in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-better-recall/pull/19


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-better-recall/compare/0.0.4...0.0.5

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed for Users
* feat: add support for FSRS implementation (#6)
* feat: add ability to change the scheduling algorithm in settings
* feat: add default deck if no decks exist in the data (#12)
* refactor: switch hard and good buttons
* fix(ui): issue with border color in review view
* fix(ui): issue with shrinked text for modal (#18)
* fix: issue with updating learn and due cards count when deleting cards

## What's Changed for Devs
* feat: add migration to migrate old anki data to new data schema
* refactor: use `toISOString` instead of `toDateString` for deck dates
* build: bump dependencies to newest version

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-better-recall/compare/0.0.3...0.0.4

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed for Users
* feat: add empty deck paragraph for cards list
* fix: issue with content being cut off (#7) in https://github.com/FlorianWoelki/obsidian-better-recall/pull/9

## What's Changed for Devs
* refactor: adjust hard-coded strings to consts
* build(ci): update node and pnpm for unit-test workflow
* build: bump dependencies to latest versions
* build: adjust config to watch css files in dev mode as well
* fix: broken vitest config

releases.author: FlorianWoelki
releases.description:
## What's Changed

- feat: add full markdown support. Images, Headers, and Internal Links are now displayed while learning flashcards
- feat: adding a card becomes easier through multi-line support
- fix: issue when reopening the review pane will add all cards again to the review queue
